title: Baarish Ki Awaaz
poem_text:
Tap tap tap, baadal hai
Chhap chhap chhap, paani hai
Patak patak, chhat pe sab
Thak thak thak, darwaaze ab
Sarr sarr, hawa chali
Gunghun gunghun, neend chali
Chip chip chip, boondein hain
Tip tip tip, sapne hain
Tap tap tap, neend aaye
Chhap chhap chhap, so jaaye
cover_context: A small Indian rooftop in soft watercolor twilight, raindrops falling on banana leaves, warm yellow window glow, blue-grey monsoon clouds gentle and hazy
style_prompt: Children's Hindi musical poem, soft harmonium and gentle tabla, 92 BPM, soft and settling, warm steady rhythm, almost a lullaby, warm clear North Indian female vocal speaking each word rhythmically, native Hindi pronunciation, every word crystal clear, like a parent reciting a poem at bedtime, not sung — spoken to a beat. Not Western.
